p.t-if: doc.street or doc.street2 or doc.city_id or doc.state_id.name or doc.country_id.name

h3.t-if: doc.type or doc.property_subtype_id or doc.sale_lease or doc.property_seq

table.t-if: doc.type or doc.property_subtype_id or doc.sale_lease or doc.property_seq

div.t-if: doc.total_area or doc.measure_unit or doc.usable_area or doc.measure_unit

td.t-attf-style: width: 33.33%; padding: 15px 20px; text-align: left; border: 2px solid #eee; #{'border-top: none;' if is_first_row else ''} #{'border-bottom: none;' if is_last_row else ''} #{'border-left: none;' if is_first_col else ''} #{'border-right: none;' if is_last_col else ''}

img.style: width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 10px; vertical-align: middle; margin-right: 10px;

td.t-attf-style: width: 33.33%; border: 2px solid #eee; border-top: none; border-bottom: none; #{'border-right: none;' if is_empty_last_col else ''}

div.t-attf-style: width: 100%; margin-bottom:15px;padding: 15px 20px; border: 2px solid #eee; vertical-align: top; text-align: left; box-sizing: border-box;border-radius: 10px;

td.t-attf-style: width: 33.33%; padding: 15px 20px; text-align: center; vertical-align: top; border: 2px solid #eee; #{'border-top: none;' if is_first_row else ''} #{'border-bottom: none;' if is_last_row else ''} #{'border-left: none;' if is_first_col else ''} #{'border-right: none;' if is_last_col else ''}
width: 33.33%; border: 2px solid #eee; border-top: none; border-bottom: none; #{'border-right: none;' if is_empty_last_col else ''}

div.t-attf-style: margin-bottom: 20px;display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; text-align: left; box-sizing: border-box;border-radius: 10px;
margin-bottom: 20px;display: inline-block; vertical-align: top; text-align: left; box-sizing: border-box;border-radius: 10px;
